product_results.title: TUCCH Wallet Case for iPhone 16 Pro 6.3", PU Leather Folio with RFID Blocking [3 Card Slot], Kickstand Book Cover Shockproof TPU Interior Case Compatible with iPhone 16 Pro 5G 2024, Dark Blue

summary.text: Customers find this cellular phone case to be of very good quality and describe it as an excellent piece. The case provides great protection for phones and adds protection from scratches. Users appreciate its elegant and beautiful, expensive-looking appearance. The case holds up well over time and lasts for the life of phones. Customers are also happy with the color, fit, and functionality, though they have mixed opinions on the closure mechanism.

authors_reviews.title: Well crafted product with good materials
authors_reviews.text: Good quality. Made with well crafted materials. Perfect fit.
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: Étui Iphone 16 Tucch
authors_reviews.text: J'ai commandé l'étui TUCCH bleu et marron en simili cuir. Je l'aime vraiment beaucoup. En plus de protéger mon iphone, il est très élégant, a l'apparence d'un cuir. J'aime aussi le fait qu'on puisse le positionner à l'horizontal. Vraiment satisfaite de mon achat. Pour ce qui est des cartes de crédit, oui effectivement, l'étui ferme moins bien quand il y a au moins 2 cartes mais je n'utilise pas cette fonction. J'insère seulement mes factures d'achat et avec cela, pas de pb.
authors_reviews.author: Brigitte Beyaert

authors_reviews.title: Well-made, could use one less card pocket to enable better fit when closed
authors_reviews.text: Looks very expensive, well-made. Really love the blue/brown combo. Does not close tight on top half of case even without any credit cards placed in it. I installed a glass protector on phone, maybe that is causing it to not be a tight fit. I did not want style with flip-over fastener. I tend to put phone in back pocket of jeans while gardening. The flip-over fastener on other cases gets a lot of wear and tear and makes for a bulky pocket. Hoping in time the closure will improve.
authors_reviews.author: M

authors_reviews.title: Very nice case.
authors_reviews.text: Very nice case. I slipped on ice and landed directly on my phone in this case and the phone never had a mark on it. Great case.
authors_reviews.author: Alan James

authors_reviews.title: Great
authors_reviews.text: TOO GOOD - Really - I gave them 5 stars but was close to only 4 stars, for a ridiculous reason. This case arrived in a nicely wrapped package and a box that made it feel incredibly premium. The case is, itself, premium in every way (although i wish it had the locking latch / magnet). My concern is that most of the box and premium wrapping, and thank you card etc, all went straight into the garbage. In a perfect world, we would waste less... although I need to admit it really sold the case well. Good product.
authors_reviews.author: nick podolsky

authors_reviews.title: Would buy again
authors_reviews.text: greta colour choices, perfect if you want to carry credit cards, driver license, etc with the phone; can be set up as a phone stand (to watch videos), as well. I've purchased these more than once. Wears well, lasts a year or more. Great protection for phone as well.
authors_reviews.author: NHG

authors_reviews.title: Perfect combination
authors_reviews.text: Perfect combination of phone protection and travel wallet, love it!
authors_reviews.author: Kerry Church
